headlines.title: John Bolton to plead guilty in classified documents case
headlines.description: Two sources familiar with the matter say former Trump National Security Advisor John Bolton, a fierce Trump critic, will now plead guilty to one count of unlawfully retaining national security information. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: House passes Ukraine aid bill in another GOP rebuke of Trump’s foreign policy
headlines.description: The vote comes after the House passed a resolution earlier this week against President Donald Trump’s war against Iran.

headlines.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows
headlines.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

headlines.title: CIA puts senior officials on leave over officer arrested with gold bars
headlines.description: CIA officer David Rush is scheduled to appear in court Friday after the FBI said it found $40 million in gold bars stashed at his Virginia home.

headlines.title: ‘The Odyssey’ ticket rush overwhelms AMC website and app
headlines.description: Christopher Nolan’s film, which rolls out in theaters July 17, is already causing a frenzy among moviegoers.

headlines.title: Team USA’s loudest supporters say FIFA pushed them to upper deck for World Cup
headlines.description: Despite disappointment over seat locations, many supporters remain grateful for access to relatively affordable tickets.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Actor James Handy stabbed to death in Los Angeles
headlines.description: Handy played the bartender Jimmy in “Top Gun: Maverick,” Milton Briggs in “Arachnophobia” and other characters.

headlines.title: Democrats navigate a new Graham Platner controversy in Maine’s battleground Senate race
headlines.description: For the Democratic Party, the road to Maine’s Senate primary is paved in dread.

headlines.title: House passes Ukraine aid bill in another GOP rebuke of Trump’s foreign policy
headlines.description: The vote comes after the House passed a resolution earlier this week against President Donald Trump’s war against Iran.

headlines.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows
headlines.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

headlines.title: St. Louis to host 2028 U.S. Olympic marathon trials
headlines.description: The men’s and women’s races will determine who will represent Team USA at the Los Angeles Olympics in 2028.
